indications.text:
ATROVENT Nasal Spray 0.03% is indicated for the symptomatic relief of rhinorrhea
associated with allergic and nonallergic perennial rhinitis in adults and children age 6 years
and older. ATROVENT Nasal Spray 0.03% does not relieve nasal congestion, sneezing, or
